what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-d02d74aa.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Stored as a Markdown file in a channel_attachments directory.
References an external board item via a URI-style identifier.
concerns: The empty body provides no attachment content or context.
The board:// target cannot be resolved or verified from this file alone.
No description or role explains why this attachment exists.
notes: A sparse metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-d02d74aa.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is board://item-d02d74aa and where is it defined?
Is the empty body intentional or incomplete?
How is the 'board_items' attachment type processed by the system?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — no explicit purpose is stated; the file only stores an association record.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference between channel memory and board items.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory, creating a traceable link for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as the target value and an empty-body attachment record.
contribution: It contributes a typed association between an attachment identifier and a board item URI, along with channel context and a provenance timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment metadata record (id att-c1d6cbc9) in the dragnet-development channel, of type board_items, targeting board://item-d02d74aa, with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to record that board item item-d02d74aa is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory.
